# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

# Install necessary packages
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y nginx postgresql redis-server curl && \
    apt-get clean && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set up web server
COPY ./web /var/www/html
RUN echo "daemon off;" >> /etc/nginx/nginx.conf

# Set up API server
RUN curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_16.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    mkdir -p /usr/src/app
COPY ./api /usr/src/app
WORKDIR /usr/src/app
RUN npm install

# Set up database
USER postgres
RUN /etc/init.d/postgresql start && \
    psql --command "CREATE USER dev WITH SUPERUSER PASSWORD 'devpass';" && \
    createdb -O dev devdb
USER root

# Expose ports
EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

# Start all services
CMD service postgresql start && \
    service redis-server start && \
    service nginx start && \
    node /usr/src/app/server.js

# Security improvements
RUN chmod -R 755 /var/www/html && \
    chmod -R 755 /usr/src/app && \
    chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html && \
    chown -R node:node /usr/src/app

# Use a non-root user for running services
RUN useradd -m devuser && \
    chown -R devuser:devuser /var/lib/postgresql && \
    chown -R devuser:devuser /var/log/postgresql && \
    chown -R devuser:devuser /var/run/postgresql
USER devuser

CMD service postgresql start && \
    service redis-server start && \
    service nginx start && \
    node /usr/src/app/server.js
